notes: Raman spectra are used only at or before the forecasting source time; future Raman spectra are not used.
PCA centering, scaling, and components are fitted only from train_normal Raman spectra.
Ridge alpha and Raman preprocessing method are selected on val_normal only.
test_fault is used only for final evaluation, not for preprocessing selection or threshold selection.

Offline assay columns do not align with Raman sampling times in the Phase 04 processed table, so Phase 08 evaluates Raman as an auxiliary current-state modality for controlled forecasting rather than as a direct offline assay soft sensor.
